widgets_values:
write 5 prompts based on this image, I will use these in a text 2 image model. The prompts should be different, be creative. Only use the image as inspiration.

I want only the prompts and nothing else. Each prompt on its own line.

No empty lines in-between the prompts:
Prompt 1
Prompt 2
Prompt 3
Prompt 4
Prompt 5
Write a wild prompt for a video model that will take first and last frame. Maximize motion and go crazy. Give me the prompt and nothing else.

nodes.title: Model links
widgets_values:
## Model links (when running locally)

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)


**diffusion_models**

- [z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors)


**vae**

- [ae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors)


**upscale_model**

- [4x-UltraSharp.pth](https://huggingface.co/lokCX/4x-Ultrasharp/blob/main/4x-UltraSharp.pth)

Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_3_4b.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│   │      └── ae.safetensors
│   └── 📂 upscale_models/
│          └── 4x-UltraSharp.pth
```

nodes.title: Read me!
widgets_values:
Load an image, hit run and be surprised by a new loop each time!

This is an hybrid workflow. It is using local models and API nodes.

You can use Z-Image LoRAs in the Z-Image Subgraphs.

You can bypass the save frames and save videos groups to only output the final combined video.

Enjoy,
Julien | MJM
